name: Ensuiko Sugar Refining Co., Ltd.
summary: Ensuiko Sugar Refining Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells refined sugar in Japan. The company offers granular, white, stick, and liquid sugar; lactose fructose oligosaccharide; and cyclodextrin, as well as salacia granules. It also provides sugar cubes and gum syrup for the household and commercial use. The company offers its products under the Pearl Ace Mark brand. Ensuiko Sugar Refining Co., Ltd. was founded in 1904 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
